meaning: n.[医]甲状腺功能减退者,机能减退的,甲状腺adj.[医]甲状腺机能减退的
examples: After my RAI , I became hypothyroid and now have to take levothyroid.
Objective To study the value on apply of neonatal hypothyroid index (NHI).
Of this group 82% had a hypothyroid phase during the first postpartum year.
His reputation among them soared after he diagnosed Carl Lewis as hypothyroid ahead of the 1996 Olympics.
